---
title: 'Development Platform'
teaching: 10
exercises: 2
---

### How to log in to DAFNI with the training account provided:
to login in go to (https://facility.secure.dafni.rl.ac.uk/ and enter you training login and password)
for outside of training purposes you will ned to create an account here (2 types of accounts: Standard and Expert) -> (https://keycloak.secure.dafni.rl.ac.uk/realms/Production/login-actions/registration?client_id=dafni-main&tab_id=oBeLvJoSFOU&client_data=eyJydSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZmFjaWxpdHkuc2VjdXJlLmRhZm5pLnJsLmFjLnVrL2xvZ291dCIsInJ0IjoiY29kZSIsInJtIjoiZnJhZ21lbnQiLCJzdCI6ImVlYTNlN2NlLTMwNmUtNGI0MS05NGM5LTFjYTdiNzU4YzIyMSJ9)

### You can find the information on how to upload assets here (extra, not required as part of the hackthlon):
(https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1HR-qx9Uc2nEJJN4kFvy3EG9tBL9fRaCY)
